mapper.select:
select nh.hid, nh.title, nh.type, nh.publisher, nh.page_views as pageViews, timestampdiff(hour, nh.create_time, now()) as pastHours from news_headline nh
nh.is_deleted = 0
and nh.title like concat('%', #{portalVo.keyWords}, '%')
and nh.type = #{portalVo.type}
order by nh.create_time desc

select nh.hid, nh.title, nh.article, nh.publisher, nh.page_views as pageViews, nh.version, nt.tname as typeName, timestampdiff(hour, nh.create_time, now()) as pastHours from news_headline nh left join news_type nt on nh.type = nt.tid where nh.is_deleted = 0 and nh.hid = #{hid}
mapper.update: update news_headline set page_views = page_views + 1 where hid = #{hid} and is_deleted = 0
